name: Izzy Pinzer
title: Interior Designer
homeAbout: Isadora (Izzy) Pinzer is an interior designer, creative professional, and 3D visualizer dedicated to crafting intentional, human-centric interiors. She believes that great interior design is about more than just aesthetics; it is the art of creating functional, inspiring spaces where interior architecture, environmental psychology, and sustainable practices seamlessly connect to improve everyday life.

She graduated in May 2024 with a Bachelor of Fine Arts in Interior Architecture from Endicott College in Beverly, MA. A pivotal moment in her design education was studying abroad in Copenhagen through DIS (Danish Institute for Study Abroad) in the Fall of 2021. This firsthand immersion in Scandinavian design deeply influenced her design philosophy, instilling a love for clean lines, functional spaces, and natural light.

In her professional work, Izzy is particularly passionate about the rendering and visualization phase. She enjoys taking collaborative concepts and translating them into realistic 3D spaces using Revit, SketchUp, Enscape, and Lumion. Committed to continuous learning, she aims to expand her technical skills with tools like V-Ray, 3ds Max, and Rhino.
Outside of her design work, Isadora is an avid baker who loves trying out new recipes, as well as a proud dog mom who enjoys spending time with her dog.
